goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should have 'a star of 3'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that 'doesn't have free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'area', and 'price range'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 12:30'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'arrival time', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should have a star of 3
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the type of guesthouse
If there is no such hotel, how about one that doesn't have free wifi
Make sure you get phone number, area, and price range
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave after 12:30
The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from bishops stortford
Make sure you get train ID, arrival time, and price
